name: SOL Exhaustion Value Reacceptance v1
thesis: In mixed transition/chop conditions, SOL 4h may offer better mean-reversion opportunities after exhaustion only once price reaccepts prior value. The edge should come from fading stretch after structure repair rather than blindly catching oversold or overbought readings.
invalidation_condition: If exhaustion-plus-reacceptance still fails to generate enough trades or post-cost PF above 1.0, then SOL 4h reversal logic needs broader context or should be deprioritized.

long: Take profit: 1.2 * ATR_14 above entry for 50% size
Time-based de-risk: reduce remaining size by half after 3 bars if gain < 0.5 * ATR_14
short: Take profit: 1.2 * ATR_14 below entry for 50% size
Time-based de-risk: reduce remaining size by half after 3 bars if gain < 0.5 * ATR_14

regime_filter.detection_method: Require band stretch plus close-based value reclaim through EMA_20 before entering reversal.
